title: unshare: make adjusting the OOM score optional
body: The OOM score adjustment is an optional field in the runtime spec, so only try to set it in our unshare if it's set in the spec.  This _might_ help with a problem that @vbatts is running into attempting to use buildah inside of a kubernetes pod.

comments.body: this is a decent step. I think we may eventually want to check if env variable `container` is set, and run in an altered state for being _inside_ a container. Like some errors aren't fatal because EPERMs could be expected.

:pushpin: Commit 260fdef has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 260fdef910893669734f788bc4a89c489542d67a -->
just tested this, and it got past that EPERM (and on to the next issue...). So :+1:
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #901) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
